final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform, designed for high-end magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: editorial magazine cover with the refined restraint of contemporary design publications, designed for social media discovery
Composition: diagonal composition, visual elements arranged along a strong diagonal axis creating dynamic tension and movement
Subject: announcement of GPT-image-2 availability on Lovart platform
Scene/backdrop: minimalist editorial backdrop with generous breathing room, allowing typography to command attention
Lighting/mood: the crisp confidence of a headline moment, editorial gravitas meeting social media immediacy
Color palette: high-contrast accent colors in bold dialogue, neutral base punctuated by a single commanding hue
Materials/textures: matte paper finish with subtle editorial depth, the tactile authority of printed matter
Text (verbatim): GPT-image-2, Lovart
Constraints: diagonal visual flow, text hierarchy with GPT-image-2 and Lovart as primary elements, magazine-grade typographic treatment
Avoid: cluttered layout, low-contrast pastels, generic social media template aesthetic, decorative noise competing with headline
